The report, published by MyHome.ie and Davy, found that annual inflation has now slowed to just 0.72% nationwide. In the last quarter of the year, prices declined by 0.45% nationally and by 0.5% in Dublin. The average price for new sales nationally is now €267,000, while in Dublin it is €374,000. The findings come just days after property website Daft.ie found reported that prices were down by 1.2% in 2019. It was the first fall in prices since 2012. The sadaqah al-fitr, popularly known as fitrah, is a sadaqah that is obligatory for a Muslim who is religiously rich and reaches the end of the month of Ramadan to give to certain people as a thankfulness for being created as a human being and for fasting the Ramadan fast and reaching Eid. Its obligatory nature is established by the Sunnah. A person is obliged to pay Fitr for himself and his minor children. retrieved_kb_texts: Conformity: rules is about obeying formal rules, laws, and explicit obligations imposed by authorities or institutions. Its motivation is to avoid disrupting the social order or incurring sanctions by respecting regulations, procedures, and official expectations. People guided by this value see compliance with rules as necessary to maintain order and proper functioning in collective life.

Benevolence: dependability is about being a loyal, responsible, and trustworthy member of one’s close groups. It has been observed that insomnia, one of the most common sleep disorders, turns into a syndrome when it becomes persistent and affects the quality of life badly. retrieved_kb_texts: Self-direction, Stimulation and Hedonism mainly express growth and expansion motives such as exploring, enjoying life and choosing one’s own path. Security, Conformity and Tradition mainly express self-protection motives such as avoiding danger, sanctions and disruption. When a sentence highlights threats, dangers or the need for strict control, self-protection values (Security, Conformity, Tradition) are more likely; when it highlights exploration, enjoyment or personal choice without much reference to threat, growth values (Self-direction, Stimulation, Hedonism) are more likely.

Stimulation captures the search for excitement, novelty, and challenge in life. People for whom this value is important want an active, varied, and adventurous life and dislike routine and predictability. They are motivated to seek new experiences, changes of pace, and environments that keep them alert and engaged.
